title: hangwin/mcp-chrome
abstract: Chrome MCP Server 🚀 🌟 Turn your Chrome browser into your intelligent assistant - Let AI take control of your browser, transforming it into a powerful AI-controlled automation tool. The project is stil...
abstract_zh: 有没有遇到过写着写着周报就超时的囧况？或者调试Bug到怀疑人生？快来试试 **mcp-chrome** 吧！它能自动记录你的操作，生成详细的报告和日志。写周报时省去了大量数据整理的时间；调Bug时更是帮你快速定位问题，简直是加班党的救星！
